related_branch_changes: Preview-safe API routing for account registration submission.
Preview-safe API routing for Team Admin registration request review.
Worker CORS support for ResearchOps Pages production and branch preview origins.
Preview Worker deployment for feature branches.
Check-answers Change links reveal the form and focus the relevant field.
The passive check-answers container is no longer focusable.
Route-state tests cover preview API routing, CORS, deployment and check-answers behaviours.
validation_expectation: The next validate run should pass trace coverage because a JSON trace now exists under docs/agent-audit/reasoning/2026/05/13/.
Additional workflow failures remain possible because the supplied log stopped at trace coverage.
